pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires saving to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/Phoenix_Residential_5kW.json
Task description explicitly requires Phoenix, Arizona and verifier logic expects 'phoenix'
Task description specifies a 5 kW DC system, bounds of 4.5 to 5.5 are enforced in verifier.py
Task description specifies a 5 kW DC system, bounds of 4.5 to 5.5 are enforced in verifier.py
Task description specifies roughly 20 degrees slope, bounds of 15 to 25 are enforced in verifier.py
Task description specifies roughly 20 degrees slope, bounds of 15 to 25 are enforced in verifier.py
Task description specifies south-facing (180 degrees azimuth), bounds of 175 to 185 are enforced in verifier.py
Task description specifies south-facing (180 degrees azimuth), bounds of 175 to 185 are enforced in verifier.py
Independent PySAM simulation with Phoenix weather data yields ~8700 kWh, confirming the expected minimum boundary.
Independent PySAM simulation with Phoenix weather data yields ~8700 kWh, confirming the expected maximum boundary.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for system_advisor_model_env create_residential_pv_system task. Verified that the task uses real NREL PSM/TMY weather data for Phoenix. Confirmed the expected DC size of 5kW, tilt of 20 degrees, and azimuth of 180 degrees directly from the prompt instructions, which accurately correspond to the verifier boundary conditions. Executed an independent PySAM simulation with the Phoenix weather data and calculated an annual output of ~8700 kWh, successfully validating that the 7000-9500 kWh expected range is empirically correct.
